meta.title: How the 11-a-side engine learns — real DP + neural nets + LP + QP
meta.note: The EPV value function is the REAL fitted grid (16x10, 58,555 possessions). Value-iteration, the formation assignment LP, the spacing QP, the reward-weight evolution strategy and the league ELO are all really computed (numpy).
meta.vs_5v5: Unlike the 5-a-side standalone (no tabular DP, no formation LP), the full engine runs approximate DP (EPV + DP-bootstrapped critic targets + multi-pass credit replay), an interior-point formation solver, and QP model-predictive control.
pipeline: learned world model (MCTS disabled on the accepted frontier)

feature_groups.name: egocentric base
feature_groups.desc: self + relational teammates/opponents/ball in the actor's own frame

feature_groups.name: whole-field motion
feature_groups.desc: all 22 players + ball × (pos·vel·accel·jerk) — the full field vector

feature_groups.name: belief blocks
feature_groups.desc: HIDDEN: Kalman perception-confidence + opponent-press + human-intent beliefs (POMDP)

feature_groups.name: tactical structure
feature_groups.desc: back-four line model, midfield band, off-ball spacing, carrier line-break

feature_groups.name: control & options
feature_groups.desc: learned-MPC replan, option control, decision cadence, first-touch, pass-and-move…

feature_groups.name: contextual tails
feature_groups.desc: append-only field-aware POMDP reward, possession/duel, spacing, and individual-MPC context

config_groups.name: own 11 × 9
config_groups.desc: each: pos, vel, accel, jerk, possession (ball-proximity weighted, τ=14yd)

actions.name: pass_short
actions.desc: Progressive pass to the best outlet.

actions.name: pass_switch
actions.desc: Switch play to the open flank.

actions.name: through_ball
actions.desc: Killer pass in behind the line.

actions.name: cross
actions.desc: Deliver from wide into the box.

actions.name: carry
actions.desc: Drive with the ball into space.

actions.name: press
actions.desc: Pressure the ball / trigger the press.

actions.name: cover
actions.desc: Cover the space behind the press.

actions.name: make_run
actions.desc: Run in behind / stretch the line.

decisions.title: In possession, opponent half — a runner peels in behind
decisions.story: Left to itself the neural net plays the SAFE short pass. But the DP/Q prior — built from replayed outcomes — knows the through-ball in behind creates far more value, and lifts it to the top of the blend. DP corrects the myopic choice.

decisions.title: Out of possession — press trigger vs hold shape
decisions.story: The net wants to press; the DP prior tempers it (a broken press concedes in behind). The blend samples press most, cover next.
